input: {"command": "node -e 'const c=[42,55,61,88,130]; const p=[4.1,4.8,5.2,7.9,11.4]; const delay=1.18; const nowcast=c.slice(); nowcast[nowcast.length-1]=+(c[c.length-1]*delay).toFixed(1); const wow=(c[4]-c[3])/c[3]*100; const twog=(c[4]-c[2])/c[2]*100; const twogNowcast=(nowcast[4]-c[2])/c[2]*100; console.log(JSON.stringify({nowcast,wow,twog,twogNowcast},null,2));'"}
label: positive
